# pump_rate_ft3_per_day annual_volume_m3_per_year annual_volume_million_m3_per_year cost_p10_usd_per_year cost_p20_usd_per_year cost_p30_usd_per_year cost_p40_usd_per_year cost_p50_usd_per_year cost_p60_usd_per_year cost_p70_usd_per_year cost_p80_usd_per_year cost_p90_usd_per_year cost_p10_kusd_per_year cost_p20_kusd_per_year cost_p30_kusd_per_year cost_p40_kusd_per_year cost_p50_kusd_per_year cost_p60_kusd_per_year cost_p70_kusd_per_year cost_p80_kusd_per_year cost_p90_kusd_per_year energy_p10_kwh_per_year energy_p20_kwh_per_year energy_p30_kwh_per_year energy_p40_kwh_per_year energy_p50_kwh_per_year energy_p60_kwh_per_year energy_p70_kwh_per_year energy_p80_kwh_per_year energy_p90_kwh_per_year
